resources.string: Select target apps that this module should apply to.
Root permission is required to read/write /data/adb.

When enabled, AppXray hooks open/seek/read/write/close and logs operations. File name matching uses substring; multiple names are separated by spaces (multiple spaces allowed). Leave empty to monitor all files.
When enabled, AppXray hooks dlopen/dlsym and logs which libraries are loaded and which symbols are queried.
